subject: [DOC] Installation guidelines for PaaS components
commit_message:
[DOC] Installation guidelines for PaaS components

Guidelines for installation of Prometheus Stack and Cert-Manager

Issue-ID: OOM-2701
Signed-off-by: Sylwia Jakubek <sylwia.jakubek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Id8d9787109df7a90eb1f938836e75cbdd3a904b8

Patch Set 4:

(2 comments)

some trailing spaces...but every amend will trigger a full deployment of ONAP as a change in OOM..so if you amend, amend them all together to avoid using the gating mechanism to fix trailing spaces.. 😊

Patch Set 7:

Response on comment relative HTTPS under abandoned commit 118759. Prometheus does not directly support basic auth (https://prometheus.io/docs/guides/basic-auth/). Prometheus is an external system so we don't have impact on this issue by default.

Patch Set 7:

This commit is depended on commit under https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/doc/+/118840 so commit 118840 have to be marged as second.
